bead.title: bench-pr-A2a: bash runner skeleton + arg parsing + listing subcommands + --plan + matrix expansion + preflight
bead.description:
PROBLEM: Parent PR A replaces cmd/bench/matrix.go with scripts/benchmark/benchmark, but no bash entry point exists. This child delivers the runner's non-executing surface: dispatch, flag parsing, YAML reads, matrix expansion, --plan, preflight, and listing subcommands. The per-cell execution loop and retry semantics are split into A2b/A2c.

ROOT CAUSE: cmd/bench/matrix.go:1 is the only matrix entry point today; scripts/benchmark/benchmark does not exist (Glob scripts/benchmark/benchmark → no match). PR A's foundation must exist before A2b/A2c/A3/A4 can extend it.

PROPOSED FIX:
  1. scripts/benchmark/benchmark (new bash, +x): dispatch `./benchmark <subcommand>` for profiles|bench-sets|task-executors|harness-adapters|validate|preflight|(none=run).
  2. Run-mode flags: --profile P[,…] --bench-set B[,…] [--plan] [--force-rerun] [--retry-invalid] [--reps N] [--jobs N] [--max-cost-usd X] [--out DIR]. Parse only; --jobs and --max-cost-usd values stashed in env vars for A3.
  3. YAML reads via `yq -o=json` for profiles, bench-sets, concurrency-groups.
  4. Matrix expansion: profile × task × rep → ordered cell list. Resolve bench-set `tasks_from:` (path relative to bench-set file) and inline `tasks:`. Default `task_executor=harbor` when `framework==terminal-bench` (final schema in PR C).
  5. preflight subcommand: invoke build-harbor-runner.sh (from A1) when cached image label sha differs from current content sha; otherwise no-op.
  6. --plan: print expanded matrix as a table; create NO files; build NO Docker images; exit 0.
  7. Listing subcommands (profiles, bench-sets, task-executors, harness-adapters): iterate the corresponding scripts/benchmark/ subdir + print '# SUMMARY:' headers from each file. validate: parse each YAML/script and report errors with file:line.
  8. Stub the run path so that without --plan it errors out with `not yet implemented` until A2b lands (kept behind an internal guard so A2b is a pure addition).

NON-SCOPE (preserved from parent):
  - Per-cell execution loop, report.json composition, resume, --force-rerun, --retry-invalid runtime behavior, sweep.json (A2b)
  - Per-cell retry with attempt_of/superseded_by (A2c)
  - cell-report.schema.json (PR B); tasks_from/task_executor bench-set schema finalization (PR C)
  - Node collector/importers (PR D/E); deleting cmd/bench (PR F); docs (PR G)
  - Concurrency-group flock, --jobs pool, SIGTERM/SIGINT, in-flight.json, budget enforcement, budget.json, budget_halted, go-runner deactivation (A3)
  - Parity fixtures and diff.sh (A4)
  - Harbor image, shell adapters, runtime-probe, agent-leak fix (A1)

GOVERNING: plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification. Depends on A1.

ACCEPTANCE:
  1. TestRunnerPlanModeIsHermetic (scripts/benchmark/test/test_runner.sh::test_plan_mode_no_side_effects): `./scripts/benchmark/benchmark --plan --profile sindri-lucebox --bench-set tb-2-1-canary` prints the matrix, creates NO files under bench/results, builds NO Docker images (`docker image ls fizeau-harbor-runner` unchanged before/after), exits 0. (Parent AC1.)
  2. TestListingSubcommandsEmitSummaries (test_runner.sh::test_listing_subcommands_emit_summaries): `./benchmark harness-adapters` prints all 8 adapter names with their `# SUMMARY:` lines; same for profiles, bench-sets, task-executors. (Parent AC7.)
  3. TestMatrixExpansionOrdering (test_runner.sh::test_matrix_expansion_ordering): --plan output for two profiles × three tasks × two reps lists 12 cells in (profile,task,rep) order with stable cell_dir paths.
  4. TestPreflightBuildsOnShaMismatch (test_runner.sh::test_preflight_builds_when_label_stale): with a stale image label, `./benchmark preflight` invokes build-harbor-runner.sh; with a current label it is a no-op.
  5. TestValidateReportsErrors (test_runner.sh::test_validate_reports_yaml_errors): seed a malformed bench-set YAML; `./benchmark validate` exits non-zero and prints file:line.

GATES: `go test ./...` green (Go unchanged); `lefthook run pre-commit` green; `bash scripts/benchmark/test/run.sh`.
bead.acceptance: All 5 ACs pass; satisfies parent AC1 and AC7; go test + lefthook gates green.
